.. News Management System documentation master file, created by
   sphinx-quickstart on Fri May  8 21:38:06 2026.
   You can adapt this file completely to your liking, but it should at least
   contain the root `toctree` directive.News Management System Documentation
====================================

This project is a Django-based News Management System developed for the HyperionDev AI Bootcamp capstone project.

Features
--------

- User authentication and role management
- Reader, Journalist, and Editor dashboards
- Article creation and approval workflow
- Django REST Framework API integration
- Docker containerisation
- Sphinx-generated documentation

Project Modules
---------------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   modulesNews Management System documentation
====================================

`reStructuredText <https://www.sphinx-doc.org/en/master/usage/restructuredtext/index.html>`_
documentation for details.
